author: Drew Angerer
title: Hedge fund manager Scott Bessent has reportedly been tapped to lead the US Treasury in the new administration of President-elect Donald Trump | | newscenter1.tv
text: Hedge fund manager Scott Bessent has reportedly been tapped to lead the US Treasury in the new administration of President-elect Donald Trump - Drew Angerer - Updated [Comments](/hedge-fund-manager-scott-bessent-has-reportedly-been-tapped-to-lead-the-us-treasury-in/image_c36d260e-2403-51cd-9ad3-26d7fef2fe83.html#comments) Tags As featured on US President-elect Donald Trump is expected to pick billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, media outlets reported Friday, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs. US President-elect Donald Trump on Friday named billionaire Scott Bessent as his Treasury secretary, choosing the hedge fund manager to help execute an agenda promising tax cuts and tariffs.
